description:
Software purpose-built for planning and building teams. All the tools you need to assess, compare, annotate and approve digital plans.


New
- Added support for undo to comments
Changes
- Improved comment text selection for 0, 90, 180 and 270 degree text
- Improved comment text selection with small characters at 270 degree rotation
Fixes
- Fixed an issue causing incorrect comment selection display in some documents
- Fixed deleting a comment scrolling the image window to another selected comment
- Fixed drawing issues when changing the width of the comments panel when undocked
- Fixed drawing issues when changing the width of the find panel when undocked
- Fixed drawing issues with add reply and edit comment cancel buttons when a vertical scroll bar gets added
- Fixed incorrect Run script command enabling when all documents are closed
